test.command: npm run type-check && npm run build

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the @supabase/ssr cookie guidance to distinguish Supabase client cookie adapters (which should use getAll/setAll) from NextResponse propagation code (which may need per-cookie set loops when setAll is unavailable).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fix review for fix-scrutiny-auth-infra passed with middleware cookie propagation implemented via per-cookie `target.cookies.set(cookie)` loops, while mission guidance currently states to never use individual cookie get/set/remove.
